primary_text:
Shop the farm-direct grocery hub before anyone else.

For the first time, you'll be able to own a piece of the farm-direct grocery model we've built on the Northern Beaches. Eight NSW farms. One hub in Brookvale. A network ready to scale across Sydney.

Registration opens soon. First in gets first access.

Leave your email — we'll tell you the moment it goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Be first to shop the new hub
description: Registration opens soon. Leave your email.
_hypothesis_claim: Ownership framing ('own a piece of') is doing more work than novelty — it converts a passive waitlist into an identity offer that aligns values and money.
